title: Crossing the Chasm
author: Geoffrey A. Moore
subline: From early adopters to early majority — the deadliest gap.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The classic bell-curve adoption diagram, with a CHASM between Early Adopters and Early Majority. The chasm is a thick RED gap. A small bridge of dots spans it. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1000)">
    <!-- Baseline -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="280" x2="700" y2="280" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Adoption curve, drawn as a discrete staircase of dots to feel like 'adopters' -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <!-- Innovators: small, far left -->
      <circle cx="-620" cy="200" r="6"/><circle cx="-600" cy="220" r="6"/><circle cx="-580" cy="240" r="6"/>
      <!-- Early Adopters: rising shoulder -->
      <circle cx="-540" cy="200" r="7"/><circle cx="-510" cy="160" r="8"/><circle cx="-480" cy="120" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="-450" cy="80" r="9"/><circle cx="-420" cy="40" r="9"/><circle cx="-390" cy="0" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-360" cy="-30" r="10"/><circle cx="-330" cy="-50" r="10"/><circle cx="-300" cy="-60" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="-270" cy="-70" r="10"/><circle cx="-240" cy="-75" r="10"/><circle cx="-210" cy="-80" r="10"/>
      <!-- THE CHASM: red gap, no dots from x=-180 to x=-20 -->
      <!-- The chasm itself, drawn as thick red rule + label -->
      <rect x="-180" y="-100" width="160" height="200" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.12"/>
      <line x1="-180" y1="-100" x2="-180" y2="100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
      <line x1="-20" y1="-100" x2="-20" y2="100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="-100" y="-115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">CHASM</text>
      <!-- Early Majority: rising again on the right -->
      <circle cx="-10" cy="-90" r="11"/><circle cx="30" cy="-100" r="11"/><circle cx="70" cy="-105" r="12"/>
      <circle cx="110" cy="-100" r="12"/><circle cx="150" cy="-90" r="12"/><circle cx="190" cy="-70" r="12"/>
      <circle cx="230" cy="-50" r="12"/><circle cx="270" cy="-30" r="12"/><circle cx="310" cy="-10" r="12"/>
      <circle cx="350" cy="20" r="12"/><circle cx="390" cy="60" r="11"/><circle cx="430" cy="100" r="11"/>
      <!-- Late Majority: descending -->
      <circle cx="470" cy="140" r="10"/><circle cx="510" cy="180" r="9"/><circle cx="550" cy="210" r="8"/>
      <!-- Laggards: flat tail -->
      <circle cx="600" cy="240" r="6"/><circle cx="640" cy="250" r="5"/><circle cx="680" cy="260" r="4"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Segment labels along the bottom -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="-600" y="320">INNOVATORS</text>
      <text x="-330" y="320">EARLY ADOPTERS</text>
      <text x="220" y="320">EARLY MAJORITY</text>
      <text x="480" y="320">LATE MAJORITY</text>
      <text x="660" y="320">LAGGARDS</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A thin hairline bridge over the chasm (the book is the bridge) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <line x1="-180" y1="-110" x2="-20" y2="-110" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The bell curve IS the book, but instead of generic orbs we draw it dot-by-dot so each dot reads as a person. The CHASM between Early Adopters and Early Majority is rendered as a 160px-wide red rectangular gap, with 'CHASM' in red whisper above. The dashed bridge across the top is the only hint of solution. Title sits below in 320px whisper.
